title: First-run food, hazard, social, and school tutorial

recommended_commands.label: Run the headless playground tutorial path
recommended_commands.command: cargo run -p alife_tools --bin p35_playground -- run-all crates/alife_world/tests/fixtures/p34 examples/p35/playground_manifest.json

recommended_commands.label: Run the graphical shell manually if hardware is available

manual_graphics_note: The S09 content pack is validated headlessly. The graphical shell remains optional/manual evidence and should not be treated as content validation by itself.
